query:
SELECT pcfs.item_key, pcfs.section, pcfs.funding_source, pcfs.distribution_method, pcfs.lump_sum_month, pcfs.start_month, pcfs.end_month
FROM project_cash_flow_settings pcfs
WHERE pcfs.project_id = 4 AND pcfs.scenario = 'offplan_escrow' AND pcfs.is_active = 1 AND pcfs.section IN ('construction', 'escrow')
ORDER BY pcfs.section, pcfs.sort_order;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4E8R6wFgxnBhGVF.1a403e654cd7 --database Q366eAYG4Q7iaM8VuAmmFX --execute SELECT pcfs.item_key, pcfs.section, pcfs.funding_source, pcfs.distribution_method, pcfs.lump_sum_month, pcfs.start_month, pcfs.end_month
FROM project_cash_flow_settings pcfs
WHERE pcfs.project_id = 4 AND pcfs.scenario = 'offplan_escrow' AND pcfs.is_active = 1 AND pcfs.section IN ('construction', 'escrow')
ORDER BY pcfs.section, pcfs.sort_order;
